items.headline: Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Could Be 17.8% Overvalued After Fresh Results
items.summary: Airbnb (ABNB) is in focus for investors as its latest reported figures show revenue of US$12.65b and net income of US$2.52b. items.headline: Will Airbnb (ABNB) Turn Lower Flight Costs Into a Stronger Platform Advantage?
items.summary: In its 2026 Annual Meeting held on 5 June, Airbnb elected Alfred Lin as a Class III director for a three-year term and reported that shareholders voted down proposals on charitable discrimination reporting, digital services risk oversight, and a dual-class share sunset. At the same time, easing geopolitical tensions and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are expected to lower flight costs and potentially lift travel activity flowing through platforms like Airbnb. We’ll now examine how...

items.headline: Residence Acquires Influencer Agency  GateMaker
items.summary: GateMaker was founded in 2021 by Ashton Wall and Amelia Soohoo and has worked with brands such as Amika, Estee Lauder Companies, Glossier, LG, L'Occitane en Provence, Milk Makeup, NARS, NEST, Pacifica, Rag & Bone, Reebok, Starbucks, and more.
